vulnerability.reason: User overreliance on opaque system with no detection or override means is semantically present, capturing the sensitivity condition of defenselessness.
vulnerability.reference: User overreliance on opaque generated descriptions obscures retrieval errors, increasing acceptance of irrelevant images.
vulnerability.generated: End-users rely on opaque retrieval rankings with no means to detect or override semantic redundancy, leaving them defenseless.

impact.reason: Platform trust erosion covered, but misinformed decisions in content creation and search not explicitly stated; misleading users is a broader outcome.
impact.reference: Incorrect visual outputs lead to misinformed decisions in content creation and search, eroding platform trust.
impact.generated: Wrong image results mislead users, erode platform trust, and degrade content discovery efficiency.

dose_response.reason: Generated arc inserts user reliance and defenselessness as causal mechanisms, unlike reference's direct pathway from semantic redundancy amplification to misled retrieval rankings.
dose_response.reference: Plug-and-play visual abstraction amplifies semantic redundancy, misleading retrieval rankings in text-to-image retrieval, exposing end-users to irrelevant images, leading to misinformed decisions and eroded platform trust.
dose_response.generated: Plug-and-play visual abstraction amplifies granularity mismatches and semantic redundancy through end-users of AI search platforms relying on opaque rankings with no detection or override means, triggering defenselessness, leading to wrong results that mislead users, erode trust, and degrade efficiency.
